fields.label: Max concurrent agents
fields.description: Maximum background agents running at once — extras queue automatically.

fields.label: Default max turns
fields.description: Turn limit applied to every agent unless overridden in its .md. null = unlimited.

fields.label: Grace turns
fields.description: Extra turns given after maxTurns so the agent can wrap up cleanly before hard abort.

fields.label: Join mode
fields.description: How background-completion notifications are grouped. smart=auto, async=separate, group=always combined.

fields.label: Scheduling
fields.description: Show the schedule parameter in the Agent tool.

fields.label: Disable built-in agent types
fields.description: Hide the built-in agent types (scout, worker, etc.) — only custom .md types show.

fields.label: Tool description mode
fields.description: How verbose the Agent tool description is. full=rich, compact=~75% smaller.
